parameters.content:
## Requirements Generation Module

With the **user instructions** creates a **structured requirements document**.

parameters.formDescription:
This workflow uses artificial intelligence to transform your description into structured software artefacts.
The process follows a modular pipeline where each stage builds a new artefact with human validation steps ensuring quality and correctness.
The clarity of your description directly impacts the quality of the generated system.

values.html:
This form starts the workflow by capturing the essential context needed to produce better artefacts. Clear, concrete and precise information will lead to better output.

Please insert the zip that explains the idea you have for this application.

Before you submit
Review what you wrote so you are sure there are no inconsistencies and no missing information.

parameters.content:
## Design Generation Module

With the **structured requirements document** creates a **design json file**.

## API Generation Module

With the **structured requirements** and **UI design artifacts** creates an **OpenAPI specification**.

## Backend Generation Module

With the **structured requirements** and the **API specification** creates a **Backend Directory**.

## Frontend Generation Module

With the **structured requirements**, the **API specification**, and the **compact design summary** creates a **Frontend Directory**.

## Infrastructure Generation Module

With the **structured requirements** and the **API specification** creates an **Infrastructure Directory**.

## Test Generation Module

With the **structured requirements** and the **API specification** creates an **E2E Test Directory**.

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first() ?? { json: {}, binary: {} }; const json = { ...(item.json ?? {}) }; const url = String(json.zipDownloadUrl ?? '/webhook/review-download-file').trim() || '/webhook/review-download-file'; const safeUrl = url .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(/"/g, '"') .replace(//g, '>'); const completionHtml = `
✓

Application Generated!

Your application has been generated successfully. Click the button below to download the generated ZIP file.

ZIP
Download your ZIP file here:
application_generated.zip
⬇
`; return [{ json: { ...json, completionHtml, }, binary: item.binary ?? {}, }];

parameters.content:
## Final Delivery

Collects all approved artifacts, generates the final ZIP, and shows the completion download screen.
